description: Legal document (actually two different documents concerning the same persons) concerning the poor treatment afforded to R. Moshe, a new hazzan, by R. Nissim, the muqaddam of al-Maḥalla, and centered on issues relating to a marriage ceremony and the public evaluation of a dowry. Thirteenth century. (S. D. Goitein, Mediterranean Society, 2:74, 538; Mordechai Friedman, Jewish Marriage in Palestine, 1:296; Eliyyahu Ashtor, “The Number of Jews in Medieval Egypt,” JJS (1967), 238) EMS.
tags: Marriage, al-Mahalla, Illness, dowry, illness: excuse, Muqaddam
description_he: מסמך משפטי (שני מסמכים) על יחס גרוע לחזן חדש ר' משה מאת הנגיד ר' נסים של אל-מחלה. המאה השלוש עשרה.
